input.input:
Permission granted: you may run the Tavily CLI (tvly) and proceed to fetch live web sources for 2026-05-05. Please follow the original brief:

Task: Search the live web for notable events on the date 2026-05-05 (UTC). Produce a concise, well-sourced report in Markdown and save it to /_outputs/today_2026-05-05_events.md. Use Tavily CLI / write-report style and keep the output under ~800 words.

Required sections (single file):
- Title and date
- One-line summary of whether today is 'important' globally (yes/no) and why
- Top 5 notable items (global) with 1-line descriptions and 1 source link each (use "top 5 with ties")
- Holidays & observances worldwide (bullet list with country/region)
- Notable anniversaries (historical events tied to this date)
- Major current news headlines (3–6), each with one-line summary and source link
- Short note on any notable market / tech / cultural events happening today (if applicable)

Constraints:
- Use reliable sources; include direct links
- If no major global events, state so and list local/sector items
- Neutral, factual language
- Return only: the path(s) written and a single-sentence short summary of the report (do NOT paste file contents)

Deliverable: write file to /_outputs/today_2026-05-05_events.md and return only the path plus a short summary.

Thank you.

output:
/_outputs/today_2026-05-05_events.md

The report finds 2026-05-05 globally notable: ongoing Iran-related conflict and Strait-of-Hormuz risks are driving energy/market and diplomatic consequences, the Spirit Airlines collapse is causing major travel disruption, and the date also features major cultural (Met Gala), sports (NHL draft lottery) and multiple observances (Cinco de Mayo, World Asthma Day, National Teacher Day, International Day of the Midwife).
